title: Investment-Based Immigration - Green & Spiegel

## Investors and Entrepreneurs
Home > U.S Immigration-2 > U.S. Immigration > Investment-Based Immigration

## Supporting your investment
If you are considering investing in or opening a new office of your foreign business in the United States, please contact us to discuss the various options which may be available to you as you move forward with your new venture. As an investor and/or entrepreneur, you may have a number of immigration options available, but the criteria for these visas are extremely specific and very carefully controlled. Therefore, getting professional advice is essential.
Our firm sets ourselves apart with a dedicated investors and entrepreneurs unit comprised of some of the brightest minds in the investment migration industry. We take great pride in helping individuals and businesses succeed by connecting them with the right immigration programs based on their needs and circumstances. Offering global solutions, our clientele may select from a range of immigration options matched by no others in the industry. Our strategies in this regard are so well respected that we have invited to speak at numerous seminars held by foreign governments for their corporate citizens.
International immigration policies, practices and systems are complex. Moreover, significant changes to these systems are afoot with recently introduced legislation and regulatory changes. Our team includes specialists, immigration educators, award winners, and published authors. Green and Spiegel U.S. provides all the benefits of a large firm, while maintaining the individualized service of a boutique firm that has a demonstrated track record of success in investment immigration. For more information, visit our Investment Immigration website.
